question: You picked El Segundo. Where does the night actually go?
dek: Post-pick follow-up. Same town, six ways to spend the rest of it.

options.label: Walk the Strand · north
options.hint: Manhattan pier and back, phone away, the slow version

options.label: Richmond St · one beer somewhere
options.hint: ESB taproom or the Purple Orchid, depending on the mood

options.label: Dockweiler fire pit
options.hint: wood from the market, planes overhead on approach to LAX

options.label: Home · soft landing
options.hint: kitchen · sofa · whatever's leftover · in bed by 10

options.label: Hyperion at dusk · drive
options.hint: 405 behind you, refinery flame, city grid lighting up

options.label: Main St · sidewalk table
options.hint: sit out somewhere, watch the town walk by

outcomeAction: Winning move gets a cc-authored visit block the following weekend — real writeup from the place.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — 'once selected more polls about that pathway and then other polls that are similar so multiple start points and potential paths'
